title: Role
description: Common v1 role contract. A role is an audited grouping of permissions and must not be used as the action enforcement point.
$comment: Source: docs/documents/3. tech/02-TECH-01-FOUNDATION-RBAC-AUDIT-IDEMPOTENCY-EVIDENCE-REGISTRY.md. TECH-01 explicitly states that permission, not role name, enforces action access.

roleCode.description: Controlled role code. Do not hardcode role names into business logic.

scope.description: Access scope for this role, when scoped access is required.
